## Type

- [ ] feat

## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change; commits are atomic
- [ ] Tests added or updated, passing locally with `-race`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` is clean
- [ ] Generated output compiles, if a module or template changed
- [ ] No AI attribution in commits, code, or docs
